item.title: Use generative AI assistants like ChatGPT for FREE
item.description: If youre intrigued by the concept of AI assistants like ChatGPT, Google Bard, Bing Chat, or others, you might have certain apprehensions regarding privacy, expenses, and beyond. This is where Llama 2 steps in. Llama 2 is an open-source large language model engineered by Meta, boasting variants spanning from 7 billion to 70 billion parameters.
